chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl.Misc.Appln.No.510, 511 and 512 of 2022 Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of main case 05.06.2025 Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Addl.PG ************* The instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application under Section 94 read with Section 561-A, Cr.PC has been preferred by the State for seeking information from the Respondent/Bank with respect to certain transaction and information regarding some Cheques, however; per learned Addl.PG, such an information was not provided by the Respondent/Bank, hence this application. Today, the concerned Investigation Officer is not in attendance so also on multiple dates of hearing, he was absent. 2. Record reflects that on 05.03.2024, Mr. Wajahat Husain and Syed Murtaza Ali, the concerned authorized Officers of the Bank were present in Court and they also filed the requisite information and documents which were required by the Investigation Officer in this case. Time was sought for consultation with the Investigation Officer on the same, however since last more than one year has been elapsed, neither the Investigation Officer is present nor did he place any objection to the information provided by the Bank. 3. Learned Addl.PG states that the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application can be disposed of if the directions are issued to the Respondent/Bank to further cooperate with the Investigation Officer, with respect to the specific transaction mentioned herein, in case any further information is required. Order Accordingly. The instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application therefore stands disposed of in the above terms.
Order Accordingly. The instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application therefore stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E brohips
